untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders pattern detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition (identifying shoulder peaks, head peak, and neckline). This requires historical bar-by-bar analysis not expressible as single-bar indicator conditions. The measure rule calculation [(HTF High - Trend Start Low) ÷ 2] + HTF Low also requires tracking pattern-specific reference points (HTF High, Trend Start Low) that cannot be derived from standard indicators. Volume comparison (light vs heavy breakout) was approximated using hvol_20, but true pattern identification is not possible with allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Entry uses price crossing above pivot (as proxy for breakout) with light volume condition (volume < hvol_20). Exit uses reversal below pivot. However, this does NOT capture the actual Head-and-Shoulders formation or measure rule calculation. A custom pattern detector would be required for accurate implementation.
